rows.notes: Consensus on description and type. gemini-flash and claude-haiku match exact description in image. gpt-5-mini included an extra period.
Consensus on description and type. gpt-5-mini included an extra period.
Selected gemini-flash. Description and amounts (£5716 4s 6d) match the image precisely. gpt-5-mini misread '5716' as '5715'. claude-haiku misidentified description and values.
Selected gemini-flash. Description and amounts (£236 15s 10d) match the image precisely. gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku misread 'Litigacy' as 'Library'. claude-haiku also misread shillings as '16'.

Amounts (£5952 0s 4d) are consistent between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. The sum of preceding entries (5716.4.6 + 236.15.10 = 5953.0.4) differs from the ledger's written total of 5952.0.4, as gemini-flash noted. claude-haiku missed this total row.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual inspection confirms 'Furniture' is a header. The amount '3000' belongs to the indented 'II.229.' entry below it. gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku incorrectly treated 'Furniture' as an entry with an amount.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual inspection confirms 'Investments' is a header. The amount '6011 14 2' belongs to the indented 'I.250.' entry below it. gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku incorrectly treated 'Investments' as an entry with an amount.

Selected gemini-flash. This is a distinct entry in the ledger with amount £3000. The ' . ' implies zero shillings and pence. gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku missed this entry by combining its value with the 'Furniture' header.

Selected gemini-flash. This is a distinct entry in the ledger with amount £6011 14s 2d. gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku missed this entry by combining its value with the 'Investments' header; gpt-5-mini also misread pounds as '6511', and claude-haiku misread as '6071'.

Selected gemini-flash for correct total amounts (£9571 14s 2d). Note that the sum of preceding entries (3000.0.0 + 6011.14.2 = 9011.14.2) differs from the ledger's written total of 9571.14.2. gpt-5-mini's total was incorrect ('9511') due to prior misreadings. claude-haiku missed this total row.
Consensus on type and core description. gemini-flash included the hyphen from the image. gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku omitted the hyphen.

Selected gemini-flash. Description and amounts (£13 4s 0d) accurately reflect the image. The ' .' indicates zero pence. gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku misread '13 4' as '134'. claude-haiku also misread 'Rent of Lands' as 'Bank of Lands'.

Amounts (£224 15s 3d) are consistent across all three extractors. Selected gemini-flash for its accurate and complete description 'Tithes I.29.'. gpt-5-mini omitted 'I.29.'. claude-haiku misread 'Tithes' as 'Leither'.

Amounts (£53 13s 4d) are consistent across all three extractors. Selected gemini-flash for its accurate and complete description 'Houses on long Leases I.17.'. gpt-5-mini omitted 'I.17.'. claude-haiku noted ambiguity in description but provided a less accurate version ('Houses on Long Lanes [or] Reversible').

Selected gemini-flash. Description and amounts (£1 15s 0d) accurately reflect the image. The ' .' indicates zero pence. gpt-5-mini omitted 'I.22.'. claude-haiku missed this row, instead having a misidentified 'Senior Common Room' row with different amounts.

Amounts (£70 0s 0d) are consistent across all three extractors. Selected gemini-flash for its accurate and complete description 'Senior Common Room II.199.'. gpt-5-mini omitted 'II.199.'. claude-haiku misread 'Senior' as 'Junior'.

Consensus on amounts (£484 3s 7d). Extracted as written from the ledger. Note that the sum of the preceding entries (13.4.0 + 224.15.3 + 53.13.4 + 1.15.0 + 70.0.0 = 363.7.7) significantly differs from the ledger's written total of 484.3.7, indicating a ledger discrepancy. gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini both noted discrepancies with their respective calculations, aligning with the visual truth.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual inspection confirms 'How Exhibition Fund' is a header. gpt-5-mini incorrectly treated it as an entry, associating it with the amount of the subsequent line. claude-haiku significantly misread this header and its context.

Selected gemini-flash. Description and amounts (£18 10s 11d) accurately reflect the image. gpt-5-mini misidentified this row, instead listing the name 'Mitchell' and the values from the *subsequent* entry. claude-haiku was significantly incorrect for this row.

Selected gemini-flash. Correctly identified ditto marks for the description and the amount (£16 14s 0d) from the image. gpt-5-mini completely missed this distinct row, having already captured its values in the previous entry. claude-haiku extracted the correct amount but a garbled description.

Amounts (£19 12s 7d) are consistent across all three extractors. Selected gemini-flash for its accurate and complete description 'Lorcombe Richards Fund I.166.'. gpt-5-mini had 'Loscombe' and claude-haiku had 'Locombe Reduction Fund'.
Consensus on amounts (£54 17s 6d) and type. The calculation (18.10.11 + 16.14.0 + 19.12.7 = 54.17.6) matches the ledger's total.

rows.description: I certify that the Accounts of the College are duly
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini's interpretation of splitting this certification block into distinct lines as seen in the image. claude-haiku condensed this into a single, long header entry.

rows.description: kept in proper books of account & that the Abstracts
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini's interpretation of splitting this certification block into distinct lines as seen in the image.

rows.description: and Balance Sheet contain a full & true account
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini's interpretation of splitting this certification block into distinct lines as seen in the image.

rows.description: of the financial condition of the College.
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini's interpretation of splitting this certification block into distinct lines as seen in the image.
Consensus on the date. Selected gemini-flash for its most accurate reproduction of the exact text '8.th'. claude-haiku incorrectly identified the type as 'entry'.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual inspection clearly shows the signature as 'W. C. Jackson F.C.A.'. gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku significantly misread the surname and post-nominals. claude-haiku incorrectly identified the type as 'entry'.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual inspection clearly shows this text as an address. gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku both significantly misread and misinterpreted this text as a 'second signature block' or 'additional attestation'. claude-haiku incorrectly identified the type as 'entry'.

Consensus on amounts (£16002 15s 7d) by gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. claude-haiku misread the pounds as '1602' instead of '16002'. No description text is present in the ledger for this final total line.
